topic: Determination of Forward and Futures Prices
title: Valuing Forward Contracts: If the futures price of an asset is higher than...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: If the futures price of an asset is higher than the spot price, what does this indicate?

options.text: Difference between spot and futures prices
A futures price higher than the spot price indicates that the market expects

solution: A futures price higher than the spot price indicates that the market expects the asset price to rise in the future. [[24]]
